functions.name: addValkey
functions.description: Adds a Valkey container to the application model.
functions.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: addValkey(name: string, port?: number, password?: ParameterResource): ValkeyResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port to bind the underlying container to.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the password for the Valkey resource. If `null` a random password will be generated.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Valkey server.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: passwordParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the Valkey server password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the Valkey server.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the Valkey server.
functions.remarks: Format: `valkey://[:{password}@]{host}:{port}`. The password segment is omitted when no password is configured.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Valkey container resource and enables Valkey persistence.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount. Setting this to `true` will disable Valkey persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Valkey container resource and enables Valkey persistence.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume. Setting this to `true` will disable Valkey persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withPersistence
functions.description: Configures a Valkey container resource for persistence.
functions.remarks:
Use with `WithDataBindMount`
or `WithDataVolume` to persist Valkey data across sessions with custom persistence configuration, e.g.:
```
var cache = builder.AddValkey("cache")
.WithDataVolume()
.WithPersistence(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10), 5);
```

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The interval between snapshot exports. Defaults to 60 seconds.

parameters.name: keysChangedThreshold
parameters.description: The number of key change operations required to trigger a snapshot at the interval. Defaults to 1.

handleTypes.name: ValkeyResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a Valkey resource independent of the hosting model.
